name: deoxyelephantopin
summary: Sesquiterpene lactone linked to inflammatory and apoptotic signaling.
description: Deoxyelephantopin is a sesquiterpene lactone tied to inflammatory cytokine signaling and apoptosis-related pathways in preclinical models.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
